'''Edallia Monotheer''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], and the wife of [[Dalls Petothel]]. She was also the mother of [[Gara Petothel]]. Monotheer was trained as an actress and also as an [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] agent working for [[Director of Imperial Intelligence]] [[Armand Isard/Legends|Armand Isard]]. Later she was executed together with her husband for giving out information to an anti-imperial faction on [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]], though none of them worked for [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
